title: KEYBOO 2240 PCS Christmas Star Stickers, Holographic Glitter Stars Stickers for Rewards & Gifts, 8 Color Assorted Stickers for Kids, Teachers, Advent Calendars, Classroom, Office & Holiday Crafts
features: 【2240 PCS Rainbow Christmas Stars】Light up the season with 2240 dazzling star stickers in 8 assorted holographic colors, neatly organized on 32 sheets. This abundant set is perfect for Christmas rewards, festive crafts, and making every achievement sparkle

【Mesmerizing Holographic Glitter】Watch the magic unfold! Our premium holographic foil creates a radiant shimmer, with colors that shift and change in the light. These eye-catching stars feel like a special, magical reward for kids and students during the festive season

【Peel, Stick, Celebrate!】Super easy for Christmas activities! Each star is cleanly pre-cut for a smooth peel. They stick firmly to gift wrap, Advent calendar windows, cards, and most surfaces for festive fun, yet remove cleanly when needed

【Unleash Festive Creativity】More than just stickers! Perfect for: Creating magical Christmas reward charts; Decorating holiday gifts, cards, and Advent calendars; Brightening up classroom holiday displays; Adding sparkle to Christmas ornaments and party crafts

【The Perfect Holiday Motivator】The ultimate positive reinforcement for the festive period. Parents and teachers love using these as holiday-themed incentives. Kids are thrilled to earn them as sparkly tokens of achievement, making motivation a joyful part of your Christmas tradition
